category_sources: source_facts.description says Terminal client for Ollama; official documentation describes oterm as a terminal client for Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, and other pydantic-ai-supported providers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oterm; official documentation and GitHub README use oterm.
docs_sources: official GitHub README links to oterm Documentation; dedicated official docs are hosted at ggozad.github.io/oterm with installation, commands, MCP, tools, and configuration pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page https://github.com/ggozad/oterm and official docs link back to ggozad/oterm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal client for Ollama; official docs list multi-provider LLM support, persistent chat sessions, MCP integration, tools, and configuration.
